TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Mkibuhw, title = Mkibuhw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mkibuhw} }

S.FORM: mkibuhw Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko mkibuhw a niyaro', 160 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 450 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 41% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 183 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 59% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 267 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Ś§™ť≠ĮťĖ£30%, Amis6%, Tayal3%, Puyuma1%.
S.PHON: mkib~b~vo~u~uńßw itiniaj i *i °an ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u mkib~b~vo~u~uńßw a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u *****%, amis*%, taja…ĺ*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%.
S.FORM: mkibuhw Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko mkibuhw a niyaro', 160 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 450 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 41% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 183 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 59% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 267 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Ś§™ť≠ĮťĖ£30%, Amis6%, Tayal3%, Puyuma1%.
S.PHON: mkib~b~vo~u~uńßw itiniaj i *i °an ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u mkib~b~vo~u~uńßw a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u *****%, amis*%, taja…ĺ*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma*%.
